title: Gaban
desc: An unemployed son of an honest clerk tries to use his charm to con his way to a better life.

title: Kasak
desc: Divya, a young woman, loves Suraj, who dies an unfortunate and untimely death. She is soon forced to marry Vijay due to familial pressure but not long after demands that he divorce her.

title: Nikaah
desc: A young and attractive woman is swept off her feet by a foreign businessman, and the pair marries. However, when the man begins dedicating himself more and more to his work, things go wrong.

title: Dil Hai Betab
desc: A middle-class girl falls in love with her college friend, and the couple wish to marry, then her father says that he has received a marriage proposal for her from a rich man that they cannot refuse.

title: Nirbhay
desc: After a mother abandons her child and leaves him in an orphanage, he is falsely accused of two murders and faces jail term. After he walks out of prison, he seeks revenge from the culprits.
